steps.title: Make a two-point table
steps.content: On April $1$, $x=0$ and there are $233$ views, so the starting value is $233$. Every $2$ days, the number increases by $70\%$, which means it is multiplied by $1+0.70=1.70$.

steps.title: Solve the unknown directly
steps.content: The exponent should count how many 2-day periods have passed. After $x$ days, the number of 2-day periods is $\frac{x}{2}$, so $$f(x)=233(1.70)^{x/2}$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice C has the correct starting value, multiplier, and exponent. Choices A and B use decay factor $0.70$, and choice D uses exponent $2x$ instead of $x/2$, so choice C is correct.
